---
title: "Cervical Cancer Screening Report"
params:
  geo_label:           "World"
  method:              "hpv"
  preset_label:        "Default"
  age_from:            25
  age_to:              64
  coverage:            70
  date:                ""
  logo_fsp_png:        ""
  logo_iarc_png:       ""
  pop_selected:        "–"
  screened_year:       "–"
  cito_label:          "Reflex cytology"
  cito_val:            "–"
  colpo_val:           "–"
  biopsy_val:          "–"
  ezt_val:             "–"
  followup_test_label: "Follow-up HPV"
  followup_test_val:   "–"
  followup_colpo_val:  "–"
  equip_rows:          !r list()
  inc_n:               "–"
  inc_asr:             "–"
  mort_n:              "–"
  mort_asr:            "–"
  is_brazil:           FALSE
  cap_rows:            !r list()
  assumptions:         ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme:          null
    highlight:      null
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r report, results='asis'}
p <- params

# ── helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
d   <- function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || (length(x) == 1 && is.na(x))) "\u2013" else as.character(x)
h   <- function(...) paste0(..., collapse = "")

# ── table row builders ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
row2 <- function(metric, val)
  h('<tr><td class="m">', metric, '</td><td class="r">', d(val), '</td></tr>')

row3 <- function(metric, v1, v2)
  h('<tr><td class="m">', metric, '</td>',
    '<td class="r">', d(v1), '</td>',
    '<td class="r">', d(v2), '</td></tr>')

sec_title <- function(label)
  h('<div class="sec">', label, '</div>')

th <- function(x, right = FALSE)
  h('<th', if (right) ' class="r"' else '', '>', x, '</th>')

# ── capacity bar helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
bar_col <- function(pn) {
  if (!is.finite(pn)) "#cccccc"
  else if (pn < 50) "#D9534F"
  else if (pn < 100) "#E8A838"
  else "#6BAE9A"
}
bar_w   <- function(pn) if (!is.finite(pn)) 0 else min(pn, 100)
pct_lbl <- function(pn) if (!is.finite(pn)) "\u2013" else paste0(round(pn, 1), "%")

# ── CSS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
css <- '
<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body {
  font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #1a1a1a;
  background: #fff;
}
.page { width: 182mm; margin: 0 auto; }
.hdr {
  background: #0F6B7A;
  padding: 16px 24px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.geo {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.1;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.logos {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-left: 20px;
}
.logos img { height: 36px; width: auto; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); opacity: 0.88; }
.sec {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: #f0f2f5;
  color: #0B7285;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  margin-top: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 11px;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
thead tr { background: #f8fbfc; }
th {
  padding: 5px 12px;
  text-align: left;
  font-size: 8.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0B7285;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #cce4e8;
}
th.r { text-align: right; }
tbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }
tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: #fafcfc; }
td { padding: 5px 12px; vertical-align: middle; }
td.r {
  text-align: right;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  color: #111;
}
td.m { color: #444; }
.cap-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.cap-bar  { flex: 1; height: 6px; border-radius: 3px; background: #e8e8e8; overflow: hidden; }
.cap-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; }
.cap-pct  { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 40px; text-align: right; }
.footer-rule { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; margin-top: 18px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.footer-note {
  font-size: 9px;
  color: #888;
  line-height: 1.65;
  padding: 0 2px;
}
@media print {
  @page { size: A4 portrait; margin: 10mm 12mm 12mm 12mm; }
  body { font-size: 10.5px; }
  .page { width: 100%; }
}
</style>'

# ── logos ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
logo_imgs <- ""
if (nzchar(p$logo_fsp_png) && file.exists(p$logo_fsp_png))
  logo_imgs <- h(logo_imgs, '<img src="', p$logo_fsp_png, '" alt="FSP-USP">')
if (nzchar(p$logo_iarc_png) && file.exists(p$logo_iarc_png))
  logo_imgs <- h(logo_imgs, '<img src="', p$logo_iarc_png, '" alt="IARC">')
logos_div <- if (nzchar(logo_imgs)) h('<div class="logos">', logo_imgs, '</div>') else ""

# ── Section 1: Target population ───────────────────────────────────────
sec1 <- h(
  sec_title("Target population"),
  '<table>',
    '<thead><tr>', th("Metric"), th("Value", right = TRUE), '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>',
      row2("Selected population", p$pop_selected),
      row2("Screened per year",   p$screened_year),
    '</tbody>',
  '</table>'
)

# ── Section 2: Epidemiology ────────────────────────────────────────────
sec2 <- h(
  sec_title("Epidemiology \u2014 GLOBOCAN 2022"),
  '<table>',
    '<thead><tr>',
      th("Indicator"), th("Cases / Deaths", right = TRUE), th("ASR (World)", right = TRUE),
    '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>',
      row3("Cervical cancer incidence", p$inc_n,  p$inc_asr),
      row3("Cervical cancer mortality",  p$mort_n, p$mort_asr),
    '</tbody>',
  '</table>'
)

# ── Section 3: Work-up ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
sec3 <- h(
  sec_title("Work-up"),
  '<table>',
    '<thead><tr>', th("Procedure"), th("Estimated need (annual)", right = TRUE), '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>',
      row2(p$cito_label,          p$cito_val),
      row2("Colposcopy indicated", p$colpo_val),
      row2("Biopsy indicated",     p$biopsy_val),
    '</tbody>',
  '</table>'
)

# ── Section 4: Treatment & follow-up ───────────────────────────────────
sec4 <- h(
  sec_title("Treatment and follow-up"),
  '<table>',
    '<thead><tr>', th("Procedure"), th("Estimated need (annual)", right = TRUE), '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>',
      row2("Excision (EZT)",       p$ezt_val),
      row2(p$followup_test_label,  p$followup_test_val),
      row2("Follow-up colposcopy", p$followup_colpo_val),
    '</tbody>',
  '</table>'
)

# ── Section 5: Equipment & HR ──────────────────────────────────────────
eq_body <- if (length(p$equip_rows) == 0) {
  '<tr><td colspan="4" style="color:#aaa">No data available.</td></tr>'
} else {
  paste(sapply(p$equip_rows, function(r) {
    h('<tr>',
      '<td class="m">', r$label,       '</td>',
      '<td class="r">', d(r$demand),   '</td>',
      '<td class="r">', d(r$cap),      '</td>',
      '<td class="r">', d(r$required), '</td>',
      '</tr>')
  }), collapse = "")
}

sec5 <- h(
  sec_title("Equipment &amp; Human resources needed"),
  '<table>',
    '<thead><tr>',
      th("Resource"),
      th("Demand (annual)",   right = TRUE),
      th("Capacity (annual)", right = TRUE),
      th("Units required",    right = TRUE),
    '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>', eq_body, '</tbody>',
  '</table>'
)

# ── Section 6: Capacity (Brazil only) ──────────────────────────────────
sec6 <- ""
if (isTRUE(p$is_brazil) && length(p$cap_rows) > 0) {
  cap_body <- paste(sapply(p$cap_rows, function(r) {
    pn  <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(r$pct_num))
    if (!is.finite(pn)) pn <- NA_real_
    col <- bar_col(pn)
    w   <- bar_w(pn)
    lbl <- pct_lbl(pn)
    h('<tr>',
      '<td class="m">', r$label,     '</td>',
      '<td class="r">', d(r$actual), '</td>',
      '<td class="r">', d(r$needed), '</td>',
      '<td>',
        '<div class="cap-row">',
          '<div class="cap-bar">',
            '<div class="cap-fill" style="width:', w, '%;background:', col, '"></div>',
          '</div>',
          '<span class="cap-pct" style="color:', col, '">', lbl, '</span>',
        '</div>',
      '</td>',
      '</tr>')
  }), collapse = "")

  sec6 <- h(
    sec_title("Capacity \u2014 Actual production vs. estimated need (SUS/SIA 2024)"),
    '<table>',
      '<thead><tr>',
        th("Procedure"),
        th("Actual (SUS 2024)", right = TRUE),
        th("Estimated need",    right = TRUE),
        '<th style="width:150px">Coverage</th>',
      '</tr></thead>',
      '<tbody>', cap_body, '</tbody>',
    '</table>'
  )
}

# ── Assemble full page and emit once ───────────────────────────────────
cat(h(
  css, '\n\n',
  '<div class="page">',
    '<div class="hdr">',
      '<div class="geo">', p$geo_label, '</div>',
      logos_div,
    '</div>',
    sec1, sec2, sec3, sec4, sec5, sec6,
    '<hr class="footer-rule">',
    '<p class="footer-note">', p$assumptions, '</p>',
  '</div>'
))
```
